name: AI Task Manager with Notion
description: Reads tasks from a Notion database, uses Claude AI to prioritize, organize, and suggest optimizations for the task list, updates the prioritized plan back to Google Sheets, and posts a daily task brief to Slack. Adapted from n8n's AI-powered Telegram task manager with MCP server.

source.originalName: Ai-powered Telegram task manager with MCP server

notionKey.description: Notion connection key for reading tasks

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving prioritized plan

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for the task plan

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for the daily brief

slackChannel.description: Slack channel for the task brief

focusAreas.description: Comma-separated focus areas or goals for today (e.g. 'shipping feature X, client deliverable')

steps.name: Extract task data from Notion blocks
Build Claude prompt for task prioritization
Build Sheets rows from daily plan
Save daily plan to Google Sheets
Post daily task brief to Slack
